mission: Move setup wizard guidance from top-level `allowedTools` to `permissions.allow` (issue #197). Setup Step 9 now writes `permissions.allow`. Update skill adds Step 7.6 migration with four branches. Byte-for-byte preservation on migrate; never clobber user data.
success: Reviewer verifies round-2 note is resolved: tests/test-cli.sh:test_update_skill_migration_is_non_destructive now also fails on replace/overwrite semantics, not only on dedup wording. Runs negative control for both 'replace permissions.allow' and 'union ... dedup' wording, both fire. Re-verifies all prior passes hold.
failure: Reviewer misses that the anti-pattern regex false-positives on benign text. Reviewer misses that 'drop the legacy allowedTools key' (the correct migration step) is not accidentally matched by the 'drop' pattern.
fixes_applied: Round-2 finding: tightened tests/test-cli.sh:test_update_skill_migration_is_non_destructive condition (3). Added anti-patterns for 'replace permissions.allow', 'overwrite permissions.allow', 'replace/overwrite list', 'clear permissions.allow', 'drop all entries', 'discard entries'. Targeted patterns — does NOT match the legitimate 'drop the legacy allowedTools key' instruction. Negative controls confirm both 'replace' and 'dedup' anti-patterns now trigger failure; restored, 70/70 pass.
verification_checklist: (a) Read tests/test-cli.sh:test_update_skill_migration_is_non_destructive condition (3). Verify the anti-pattern regex matches 'replace permissions.allow', 'overwrite permissions.allow', 'clear permissions.allow', 'drop all entries' — and does NOT match 'drop the legacy allowedTools key' (which is the correct behavior).

(b) Negative control: temporarily replace Step 7.6's 'append every entry ...' with 'replace permissions.allow with allowedTools', rerun bash tests/test-cli.sh, confirm test_update_skill_migration_is_non_destructive fails. Repeat with 'union the two lists (dedup)', confirm same. Restore.
(d) Re-verify round-1/round-2 passes: Step 9 recommends permissions.allow; live doc refs updated; merge-compat tests still pass; Step 7.6 text unchanged from round-2 (only the test was strengthened).
review_instructions: TARGETED RECHECK. Verify the test regex is tight (gates the right things, does not false-positive). Do NOT raise new findings unless P0.
